topics.name: Operating System
topics.description: Test your knowledge of OS concepts like processes, memory management, and deadlocks.

topics.name: Python
topics.description: Challenge your understanding of Python syntax, data structures, and features.

topics.name: DBMS
topics.description: Test your knowledge of databases, SQL, ACID properties, and regular forms.

topics.name: DAA
topics.description: Design and Analysis of Algorithms - test your computational problem-solving.

topics.name: Artificial Intelligence
topics.description: Test topics from Rich and Knight: state spaces, heuristics, and knowledge representation.

questions.question: Which scheduling algorithm allocates the CPU first to the process that requests the CPU first?
What is a process in an operating system?
options: A program in high level language

questions.question: What is a deadlock?
options: A situation where processes are running concurrently
A situation where a set of processes are blocked waiting for each other

questions.question: Which of the following is not an operating system?
What is paging?
Which algorithm is used for deadlock avoidance?
What does thrashing refer to?
options: Excessive I/O operations and page faults

questions.question: What is virtual memory?
options: An illusion of a larger main memory

questions.question: What part of the OS interacts directly with the hardware?

Who developed the Python language?

What will be the output of print(2**3)?

What does the 'len()' function do in Python?
options: Counts the number of elements in an object
Increases the length of a string

questions.question: Which operator is used to check if two values are equal in value but not necessarily identity?

options: A key that allows null values
A key that is unique and not null
A key that connects two tables

To minimize the maximum possible loss

questions.question: Which logic represents knowledge using facts that are either definitively True or False without variables or quantifiers?
What is Hill Climbing in AI?
options: A heuristic search technique for mathematical optimization
A method for deep learning backpropagation
An algorithm for generating neural networks

questions.question: A complete state space search always finds a solution if one exists. Which of these is NOT complete?
What is 'Resolution' in predicate logic?
options: A rule of inference used for theorem proving
A method to reduce image size
A way to resolve variable conflicts in python
A method to break down a state space graph

questions.question: In game playing, 'Alpha-Beta Pruning' is a technique used to:
options: Decrease the number of nodes evaluated by the minimax algorithm
